name: Special Tool Properties
pages: This page shows all available $(thing)Special Tool Properties$() and their affections.

pages.title: Merciless
pages.text: Only included in $(l:smithing/tier_2_materials#frost_metal_tools)Frost Metal tools$(/l) by default. $(br)The item included this property will loss all enchantments' affection except $(thing)Riptide/$、$(thing)Royalty/$、$(thing)Curse/$. But every level of these enchantments will provide 1 attack damage and 1 mining efficiency. $(br2)Since $(thing)Mending/$ has failed, the tool can only be repaired with materials.

pages.title: Fire Reforging
pages.text: Only included in $(l:smithing/tier_2_materials#ember_metal_tools)Ember Metal tools$(/l)by default. $(br)$(br)Tools with this attribute regain durability in hot environments: $(li)Fire: 40/s $(li)Soul fire: 100/s $(li)lava (cauldron): 200/s

pages.title: Multiphase
pages.text: The item included this property will have two "phases". Every phase will store their own name and enchantments, no affection with each other, and can switch by pressing [$(k:anvilcraft.switch_phase)] (your "Switch Phase" keybinding.)

pages.title: 永恒
pages.text: 默认在$(l:smithing/tier_3_materials#transcendence_tools)超限系列工具$(/l)上拥有。$(br)拥有此属性的工具将不会消耗耐久并拥有$(thing)不可破坏$()属性。$(br)它们还会免疫$(thing)火焰$()、$(thing)爆炸$()、$(thing)仙人掌$()和$(thing)虚空$()伤害。在$(thing)世界最低建造高度$()+5高度以下时，它们会缓慢上浮。$(br)同时，它们也不会因掉落时间过长而消失。

pages.title: 强运
pages.text: 默认在$(l:smithing/tier_3_materials#transcendence_tools)超限系列工具$(/l)上拥有。$(br)拥有此属性的工具将会有概率多次触发特定附魔。$(br)目前支持的特定附魔有：$(thing)时运$()、$(thing)抢夺$()、$(thing)斩首$()、$(thing)荆棘$()和$(thing)海之眷顾$()。$(br)每次有20%的概率可以再触发一次，5%的概率可以再触发两次。按照总触发次数就是75%触发一次+20%触发两次+5%触发三次。
